message.content:
Explore how content is rendered in the mobile app, specifically the LexicalRenderer. I need to understand:

1. How the LexicalRenderer in `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src\lib\content\LexicalRenderer.tsx` works - what node types it handles
2. How it could be extended to support a new "mention" node type
3. The navigation system - how to navigate to a user profile when tapping a mention
4. Any existing link or clickable text handling in the renderer

Search thoroughly in:
- `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src\lib\content/`
- `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src/navigation/` for navigation types

Provide the full structure of the LexicalRenderer and how it maps node types to React Native components.
